title: carex tenejapensis
intro: Carex tenejapensis is a species of sedge, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex tenejapensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Carex tenejapensis can be made by infusing the roots and leaves in water to create a tea or by drying the plant material to make a powder for later use.
